text: Arcline announces that it does not intend to make an offer for Senior.
Scheme document published - vote will be on 27 April 2026.
Deletion - scheme lapsed because of regulatory delays.
PUSU deadline extended to 28 April to allow due diligence.
New addition -  Atlas Holdings LLC makes indicative offer at 65p (59% premium), which Board stated fundamentally undervalued company. Talks ongoing.
